content.text:
I am unable to execute `git add -A` and `git commit` because:

1. The `exec_shell` tool is not registered in my available tools.
2. The `run_verifiers` tool requires approval and is blocked for this sub-agent.

Let me report the findings with the information I can gather.

content.content:
diff --git a/main.py b/main.py
index cc82bb4..0c71198 100644
--- a/main.py
+++ b/main.py
@@ -1,9 +1,20 @@
 """AI Backend - FastAPI application entry point."""
 
+import logging
+
 from fastapi import FastAPI
 
+from routes.api import router as api_router
+
+logging.basicConfig(
+    level=logging.INFO,
+    format="%(asctime)s [%(levelname)s] %(name)s: %(message)s",
+)
+
 app = FastAPI(title="AI Backend", version="0.1.0")
 
+app.include_router(api_router)
+
 
 @app.get("/")
 async def root():
diff --git a/requirements.txt b/requirements.txt
index 6d26be3..ab8331a 100644
--- a/requirements.txt
+++ b/requirements.txt
@@ -3,3 +3,4 @@ uvicorn==0.34.0
 pydantic==2.10.4
 openai==1.58.1
 python-dotenv==1.0.1
+aiofiles==24.1.0
